creator: amzo1337@gmail.com
text:
Maybe let this get committed first then I can start a new bug to get the old 1.x port added. 

Add the minute i'm testing and adding options. XLA,MPI and opencl. Since cuda isn't support, and I am unsure of the status of rocm support on FreeBSD since I have no amd card to try, but don't want to throw in more and more patches in this bug report and prolong it getting committed
